name: Renewal Risk Scanner
description: Scans accounts approaching renewal and flags those showing risk signals, with automated CSM briefing.
longDescription: Runs weekly to check all accounts renewing in the next 90 days. Cross-references renewal dates with health signals including usage trends, support ticket patterns, NPS scores, and stakeholder engagement. Generates a prioritized risk report and sends it to the assigned CSM via Slack and email with recommended actions for each flagged account.
